name: KrillApp.Trigger.Button
title: Button Triggers
description: A manual trigger that executes all child nodes when clicked by the user. Has no conditions or thresholds — simply passes execution to its children on each click. Use this for on-demand actions like toggling a pin, running a script, or sending a webhook manually.
shortDescription: Executes child nodes on user click with no conditions.
llmPurpose: Executes all child nodes immediately when clicked by the user, with no conditions or scheduling.
llmTypicalUseCases: toggle a GPIO pin on demand
llmPromptHints: add a button to run this
let me click to trigger this
llmCreationHints: Create a Button when the user wants a manual, on-demand trigger with no schedule or condition. Ideal for testing or one-off actions.

llmConnectionHints.role: root trigger node that initiates child execution on user click

llmExamples: Add a button so I can manually run this webhook.
I want to click to toggle this pin.
Create a manual trigger for testing.
